title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 14 - 2017: Caribou in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs while showing a screen capture of Caribou, Colorado, a former silver mining ghost town, sharing brief historical facts about it. He then recounts his day: dealing with insomnia and low productivity, shampooing carpet at his mom's house (causing a sudsy mess), and prepping his car for sale while lamenting that problems keep surfacing whenever he tries to sell it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feels it's hurting his productivity and focus
frustrated that new problems keep appearing every time he tries to sell it
regrets using too much concentrated shampoo, creating a long cleanup ordeal
